markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss customer discovery and positioning strategy for DataGrid, focusing on validating existing use cases and exploring potential market expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DataGrid is seeing success with a cross-industry, task-focused approach rather than a construction-specific pitch](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Current customers are in various stages of deployment, from early testing to enterprise-wide implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [The team aims to validate existing use cases, particularly in construction, to inform broader market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [There's a need to balance industry-specific knowledge with a more generalized, role-based approach to avoid limiting growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid's Current Positioning and Success

  - [DataGrid presents itself as an "agentic AI for all your data" solution](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [The company has booked $1 million in ARR in the last 110 days](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Customers are primarily from construction, but interest is growing in other industries](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [The product focuses on automating high-volume, low-complexity tasks across various workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### Customer Use Cases and Deployment Stages

  - [Many customers are in different stages of deployment:](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [Some have been using the platform for 5-6 months and are preparing for enterprise deployment](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [Others are expanding usage after initial testing](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
      - [New customers are still in the early stages of implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Example use cases include:](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Automating receipt processing and data entry (500 times daily)](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [Streamlining estimation processes in construction projects](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [Enhancing sales workflows across industries](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Market Positioning Challenges

  - [The team is cautious about narrowing focus solely on construction:](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [Construction is seen as a fragmented sector rather than a unified industry](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [Previous construction-focused tech companies have struggled to scale](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [There's a preference for a role-based or workflow-based approach rather than industry-specific marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [The goal is to maintain broad appeal while leveraging current success in construction](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Customer Discovery Process

  - [The team will compile a list of 15-20 interviewees, prioritizing:](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Existing DataGrid customers who purchased within the last 8 months](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
      - [Happy, non-churned users](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [Super users and ideal customers](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [Those who found DataGrid independently (not through warm relationships)](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Interviews will focus on understanding specific problems solved and the impact on users' roles](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [The process aims to identify common themes that can inform positioning across industries](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)

### Emerging Role: AI Agent Architect

  - [DataGrid is observing a new role emerging within customer organizations](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [This role involves deploying and managing AI agents across the enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [The company plans to highlight this trend through webinars and customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Compile a list of 15-20 ideal interviewees for the customer discovery process](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Assign a DataGrid team member to participate in customer interviews and debriefs](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Schedule customer interviews, aiming to conduct them over two days (5 per day)](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Continue exploring options for design and development support, particularly for Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=2517.0)
  - [Proceed with the handoff of social media ghost writing to the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=2465.0)
  - [Make a decision on a new design/development partner after reviewing quotes and options](https://fathom.video/share/ierB_jR-fwtxgNzUsZXU4xyj7sxRhHsE?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
